outline.caption: Benchmark your VASCO office with data-driven tools. Automate certifications, track compliance, support student veterans, and improve through benchmarking and gap analysis. Start automating your VASCO today. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Support Student Veterans', as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw more attention.
